surface_styles.primary_button: bg-emerald-500 text-white font-semibold shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(16,185,129,0.4)] transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5

components_instructions.buttons: Must be large on mobile (h-12 or h-14). Primary buttons use emerald-500 with custom colored shadow. Use icon + text for clarity.
components_instructions.cards: Use rounded-2xl. White background. Never use harsh drop shadows, use Tailwind's shadow-sm. Add a subtle 1px border (`border-slate-100` or `border-slate-200/60`).
components_instructions.inputs: Forms must use Shadcn customized inputs but with `h-12` and `rounded-xl` for better mobile tapping. Focus state must use `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/20 focus:border-emerald-500`.
components_instructions.badges: Status badges must use the semantic colors defined in the theme (very_interested = light green, enrolled = dark green). Fully rounded.
components_instructions.charts: Use Shadcn charts (Recharts) with clean, minimal axes. Use `emerald-500` as the primary chart color, maybe paired with `slate-200` for empty segments.
components_instructions.navigation: For mobile, implement a sticky bottom navigation bar with icons (Home, Leads, Marathon, Reports). For desktop, a left sidebar.
components_instructions.data_testid: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case.

login_bg.description: Green and white abstract gradient, to be used selectively with an overlay or just as a subtle texture in the login screen.

office_bg.description: Modern office workplace, can be used for marathon banners or empty states with a heavy white overlay.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a mobile-first application. Start all designs with grid-cols-1 and apply responsive classes (md:, lg:) for larger screens.
Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Figtree' for body text. Add these to Tailwind config.
Prioritize large, tappable areas. Buttons and inputs should be at least h-12 on mobile.
Follow the specific green logic: #D1FAE5 for 'Très intéressé' (lead status) and #065F46 for 'Inscrit' (enrolled). Default actions use emerald-500.

The login is ultra-simple: 'Entrez votre code'. Focus heavily on a clean aesthetic, large typography, and maybe a subtle background texture using CSS gradients or the provided image with a 90% white overlay.
Do not use dark gray backgrounds; use #F8FAFC (slate-50) for the app background to keep it looking fresh and 'épuré'.
Implement the mobile navigation as a bottom tab bar (Home, Leads, Promesses, Admin/Stats) and switch to a sidebar on md+.
Ensure all lists and tables are mobile-friendly. Instead of standard data tables on mobile, use stacked cards.
